headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Mosaic, Lowers Price Target to $25
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Michael Sison   maintains Mosaic (NYSE:MOS) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $27 to $25.
